profile.warranty_terms: Varies by retailer and specific model, typically 1 year against manufacturing defects.
profile.manufacturing_ethos: Sedici designs high-performance helmets in Italy while utilizing global manufacturing networks to balance cost efficiency with European safety standards.
profile.story: Sedici is an Italian motorcycle helmet manufacturer that has carved out a niche in the mid-range market, offering a blend of style and functionality at accessible price points. Unlike premium heritage brands or ultra-specialized racing lines, Sedici positions itself as a practical choice for daily riders who value aerodynamic design and modern safety certifications (such as ECE 22.06) without paying top-tier luxury prices. The brand name 'Sedici' translates to 'Sixteen' in Italian, though the specific etymological connection to the founding narrative is not widely documented in public industry archives compared to giants like Arai or Shoei.
